Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Ancestor's Spear]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 2''' — The Ancestor's Spear is a glowing shaft of Forged white madra scratched with lines of script.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 4''' — The Ancestor's Spear is associated with the bodies Jai Long cut.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 4''' — Jai Long used the Ancestor's Spear to strike the Remnant's rib cage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 4''' — The Ancestor's Spear is white but does not contain Stellar Spear madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 4''' — The Ancestor's Spear comes in a case.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 5''' — The Ancestor's Spear has a script.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 5''' — The Ancestor's Spear has a white shaft.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 5''' — The Ancestor's Spearhead has a single script on its surface.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 6''' — The Ancestor's Spear is a weapon that can cause wounds that do not heal correctly.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 6''' — The Ancestor's Spear is a weapon used by Jai Chen to stab Jai Daishou.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 7''' — The bindings and madra for the Ancestor's Spear came from an unknown source.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 7''' — The Ancestor's Spear functioned using both a binding and a script.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 7''' — The Ancestor's Spear is one of the weakest objects in the labyrinth maze.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 10''' — The Ancestor's Spear was able to take Jai Long from Highgold to Truegold quickly.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 16''' — The Ancestor's Spear was found in a labyrinth.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 8''' — The Ancestor's Spear was simpler to use than the hunger binding.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 14''' — The Ancestor's Spear uses scripts to guide madra.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
